issues.detail: 70% of patients prefer booking online. No booking system detected.
Missing meta description tag. This is what Google shows in search results.
No schema.org markup found. This helps Google understand your practice and show rich results.
No embedded Google Maps found. Helps patients find your practice easily.
No reviews or testimonials section found. Social proof is critical for dental practices.
Copyright year is 2017. Signals an unmaintained website to visitors.
